title: Just A Greenhouse
description: A Greenhouse Addon for Serene Seasons
body:
![Mod Logo - The Seed Drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30137259ab90c7c39435e90dc967aededf1b9bc.png)

Requires [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons).



Just A Greenhouse is an addon for Serene Seasons that spice the things a little bit. I recommend JEI for recipe viewing.

## Content

First and principal, it changes the Serene Seasons Greenhouse feature to only be compatible with a new block, the **Greenhouse Glass**.

![The new Greenhouse Glass, whoa.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45f1863a1afeff3d65e1f9ace445074c718d121e.png)

Then two new blocks are new added to decor your greenhouses:
The **Greenhouse Block** and the **Greenhouse Pillar**.

![The two other new blocks whoa.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5631ddeedff829879c81e21d4ee29db60b41605b.png)

With these new blocks you can build a more immersive-type of Greenhouse!

![A new look to your Greenhouses.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b11053a4982d2a09cc51b4ca8b5cbdbdcf79583b.png)

**1.1 The Seed Drop 🌱**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This update is based on renewable seeds for your crops and some new decorative blocks.
![The Seed Drop is here!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa66394dcd28c47d8441bd6f9f24a065b7ed1c9_0.webp)

First of all, the Greenhouse block set is now changed and expanded, Greenhouse Iron Ingot is made by blasting it in a Blast Furnace and new blocks like the Greenhouse Lamp was added.
![Greenhouse Lanterns, Doors, Slabs, Stairs, Poles, Lamps and of course the Seed Maker.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b088ed2dddf8ce79386f8879a54192facab5d49c_0.webp)

Meet the Seed Maker, a new way to generate more seeds from your extra crops, the process to use is simple: Put a Seedable item (Wheat as an example) and wait 2 minutes, after its done the Seed Maker will make a sound and your seeds will be ready!
![Its also Farmers Delight Compatible!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cd267e32d3f9938aba7587edb4d12b2d1b2c2e2_0.webp)

With the Seed Maker added, a new way to store your seeds came along in this update, the Seed Bags:
![They can be placed down and has Farmers Delight Compat too!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43e2cc86d8b0a955cefb8046ea6ba8bbfcfa5806_0.webp)

</details>

**Mod Compat ⚙️**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Seed Maker and the Seed Bags are compatible with these mods:

- **Farmer's Delight**🧅
  
- **Berry Good**🍒
  
- **Neapolitan**🍓
  
- **Atmospheric**🌵
  
- **Ramadan Delight**🌿
  
- **Veggies Delight**🥦
  
- **Hearth and Harvest**🍇
  
- **Delightful**🍈
  
- **Collector's Reap**🌳
  
- **Farmer's Respite**🍵

</details>

## Info and Terms

You **CAN** add my mod to your Modpacks, it is made for them. **You cant sell the Modpack.**
